channel.title: Jobs on Packing Panic - The Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Jobs on Packing Panic - The Blog
channel.copyright: Copyright 2023 - Packing Panic is a registered trade mark.

item.title: Picker and Packer (Flexbile time/Munich Central)
item.description: Packing Panic, an online store for lightweight travelers, is looking for a reinforement of our fulfillment team. Responsibilities Pick and collect good for delivery Pack shipments and choose optimal packaging and shipment method Receive and store goods Repack and label goods Drive to optimize the whole process Qualifications Previous experience in warehousing and fulfillment is useful but not mandatory How to Apply We are looking forward to learn more about you, get in touch with us at our Contact Form.

item.title: Content Writer (Flexbile time/Remote)
item.description: Packing Panic, an online store for lightweight travelers, is seeking a talented writer. Responsibilities Create captivating content for blogs and articles. Generate creative ideas to boost our online presence. Conduct research on travel topics for accurate information. Optimize content for search engines. Maintain a consistent brand voice. Qualifications Passion for travel and understanding of lightweight travelers’ needs. Strong writing skills with grammar proficiency. Ability to engage and inform readers. Research skills including Git Hub, HTML, and Markdown, to smoothen workflow processes.
